# NIP-35 Reference Card

### REFERENCE_CARD
kind: 2003 (Torrent) 
- required tags: `x` (V1 BitTorrent Info Hash), `file` (file entry)
- optional tags: `tracker` (tracker to use for this torrent)
- filter patterns: `tcat` (text category path), `newznab` (Newznab category ID), `tmdb` (The Movie Database ID), `ttvdb` (TV Database ID), `imdb` (IMDB ID), `mal` (MyAnimeList ID), `anilist` (AniList ID)

{
  "kind": 2003,
  "content": "<long-description-pre-formatted>",
  "tags": [
